ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1678. Prince of the Accademia dei Pacifici in Venice - see Elena Lucrezia Corner`s Discorso secondo, in her Operae (1688). He was also member of the Scomposti in Fano, and Ambigui in Sant`Angelo in Vado. Founder of the Disinvolti both in Pesaro (1645) and in Venice (1648). A biographical sketch in Santinelli, Androgenes Hermeticus, ed. Anna Maria Partini, Roma, 2000. Santinelli was particularly interested in alchemy, and published a number of volumes under different pseudonym.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
